title: JambonzClientOptions
description: Options for creating a JambonzClient instance via createJambonzClient()

server.description: WebSocket URL of the jambonz SBC (e.g., wss://sbc.example.com:8443)

displayName.description: Display name included in SIP From header

realm.description: SIP realm/domain for authentication. Defaults to the hostname extracted from server URL

registerHeaders.description: Custom SIP headers sent with REGISTER requests

autoRegister.description: Automatically send SIP REGISTER on connect. Set to false for manual registration
